record.field: Nivell d'Accés dels usuaris a la plataforma Odoo de les Comunitats Energètiques

field.name: implied_ids
field.eval: [ (5, 0, 0), (4, ref('group_admin')), (4, ref('energy_project.group_admin')), (4, ref('sale.group_delivery_invoice_address')), (4, ref('account.group_account_invoice')), (4, ref('account.group_account_manager')), (4, ref('account.group_account_user')), (4, ref('base.group_partner_manager')), (4, ref('base.group_multi_company')), (4, ref('base.group_allow_export')), (4, ref('cooperator.cooperator_group_manager')), (4, ref('sales_team.group_sale_manager')), (4, ref('purchase.group_purchase_manager')), (4, ref('account.group_account_manager')), (4, ref('account_payment_order.group_account_payment')), (4, ref('crm.group_use_lead')), (4, ref('l10n_es_aeat.group_account_aeat')), (4, ref('mass_mailing.group_mass_mailing_user')), (4, ref('mass_mailing.group_mass_mailing_campaign')), ]
